title: Senior Software Engineer - Razorpay - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Razorpay - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Razorpay in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Razorpay:
Razorpay is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay!
